settingsOptions.allowEmailUploadDesc: Enable this option to let team members and external users upload files to this Team Folder via email.
settingsOptions.allowExternalSharing: Allow Team Folder members to share outside your team
settingsOptions.allowExternalSharingDesc: Enable this option to let Admins and Organizers of this Team Folder to share files and folders outside your team using email addresses, download links, embed codes, and external share links.
settingsOptions.showDownloadPrintDesc: Enable this option to show download and print options for users with view, and view & comment access.
settingsOptions.showDownloadPrintNote: Note: By default, Team Folder members and collaborators with edit access or higher will have the download and print options.
settingsOptions.learnMoreDownload: Learn more about download and print settings
settingsOptions.smartSuggestions: Include this Team Folder's files in Smart Suggestions
settingsOptions.smartSuggestionsDesc: Choose whether to show or hide files from this Team Folder in the File Suggestions tabs of its members.
settingsOptions.convertToModern: Convert all files to Modern CRM's format on upload
settingsOptions.convertToModernDesc: Automatically convert documents, spreadsheets, and presentations that your Team Folder members upload to Modern CRM's optimized format.
settingsOptions.learnMoreConversion: Learn more about file conversion settings
